<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band14_chunk001.pdf#page=17 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band14 p32 -->

<!-- header: INGOLSTADT HL. GEIS -->


[[File:Band14_chunk001_p017_img001.jpg|thumb|29 Jejunium, 30 Oboedientia, 31 Eleemosina, 32 Castimonia]]



[[File:Band14_chunk001_p017_img002.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band14 p33 -->
